form.formComment: At the last start finished 6th on April 10 over 350m at Goulburn behind Lord Panama beaten 15 lengths (21.05) in a Mix 2/3. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last start finished 6th on April 10 over 350m at Goulburn behind Lord Panama beaten 15 lengths (21.05) in a Mix 2/3. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.80) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing fifth and beaten 4.5 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from six starts. Has ability and looks a key chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (22.80) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing fifth and beaten 4.5 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from six starts. Has ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Good performance after racing just off the speed to win by 2.25 lengths at this track over 340m (19.34) beating Ray Finkle in Grade 5 on April 7. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance after racing just off the speed to win by 2.25 lengths at this track over 340m (19.34) beating Ray Finkle in Grade 5 on April 7. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

form.formComment: Last run was an ordinary fourth over 320m at Richmond following a win two back at this track. Looks tested in this company.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last run was an ordinary fourth over 320m at Richmond following a win two back at this track. Looks tested in this company.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together approaching the 320m boxes and lost momentum.

form.formComment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Hard to have. Others look better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Hard to have. Others look better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Nearing the winning post checked off heels.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (19.69) over 350m at Goulburn. Tough draw to overcome and looks safely held.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage fifth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (19.69) over 350m at Goulburn. Tough draw to overcome and looks safely held.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the first turn found contact and came together.
Raced wide through the first turn.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by one length at Richmond over 320m (18.43) beating Canya Supersonic in Mix 2/3 on April 8. Will be tested in this company.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by one length at Richmond over 320m (18.43) beating Canya Supersonic in Mix 2/3 on April 8. Will be tested in this company.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the first turn and fell.
Was hampered by contact in the turn to the home straight.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.84) when fourth over 400m at Maitland in a NG. Has three successes and two minors from 10 starts from box 8. Looks a key chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (22.84) when fourth over 400m at Maitland in a NG. Has three successes and two minors from 10 starts from box 8. Looks a key chance on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the turn to the home straight and again in the home straight.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (20.45) at big odds over 350m at Goulburn. One of the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (20.45) at big odds over 350m at Goulburn. One of the better hopes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the turn out of the back straight hampered and came together.

form.formComment: Missed the frame when eighth (24.08) at Richmond at last run and returns here after a three-and-a-half months break. Looks a key runner while fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame when eighth (24.08) at Richmond at last run and returns here after a three-and-a-half months break. Looks a key runner while fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began to yield ground at the end of the back straight.
Exiting the first turn heels galloped on and lost momentum.
